snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Meet Squeak! - Brawler Spotlight
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! Ôû║Ôû║ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! Ôû║Ôû║ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donÔÇÖt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamÔÇÖs safe and try to crack open your opponentsÔÇÖ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youÔÇÖre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support ÔÇö or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.

But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,

And I just want to know

Keep things fresh.

(Electric)

In the dark when you feel lost

snippet.title: Una ESPA├æOLA en TEL AVIV y un doctor en GAZA describen el conflicto entre ISRAEL y HAM├üS | RTVE
snippet.description:
El Canal 24 Horas entrevista a Usama Said Agloud, neurocirujano en Gaza, y a Patricia Alonso, espa├▒ola residente en Tel Aviv.

La violencia entre jud├¡os y ├írabes se extiende en las ciudades mixtas de Israel (con importante presencia ├írabe-israel├¡), lo que abre un frente interno al gobierno israel├¡ mientras contin├║a la escalada b├®lica en Gaza iniciada el pasado lunes. 

Grupos de ciudadanos ├írabes y jud├¡os se han enfrentado y se han producido dos linchamientos: el de un ├írabe en Bat Yam y el de un jud├¡o en Acre. Ambos se encuentran en estado grave.

El ministro israel├¡, Benjam├¡n Netanyahu, ha advertido que "nada justifica el linchamiento de jud├¡os por parte de ├írabes y nada justifica el linchamiento de ├írabes por parte de jud├¡os". Por su parte, el presidente, Rub├®n Rivlin, ha descrito los incidentes como "una guerra civil sin raz├│n", y ha pedido a las autoridades locales y religiosas que intervengan para detener la violencia.

snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo - drivers license (Live From The BRIT Awards 2021)
snippet.description:
Olivia Rodrigo Performs 'drivers license' Live at the BRIT Awards 2021

Shop SOUR: https://smarturl.it/oliviarodrigoshop

Preorder SOUR: https://oliviarodrigo.lnk.to/preorder

Follow Olivia:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/oliviarodrigo/?hl=en

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/OliviaRodrigoOfficial/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Olivia_Rodrigo?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor

Tiktok :https://www.tiktok.com/@livbedumb?lang=en

Lyrics:

I got my driver's license last week
Just like we always talked about
'Cause you were so excited for me
To finally drive up to your house
But today I drove through the suburbs
Crying 'cause you weren't around

And you're probably with that blonde girl
Who always made me doubt
She's so much older than me
She's everything I'm insecure about
Yeah, today I drove through the suburbs
'Cause how could I ever love someone else?

And I know we weren't perfect but I've never felt this way for no one
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay now that I'm gone
Guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

And all my friends are tired
Of hearing how much I miss you, but
I kinda feel sorry for them
'Cause they'll never know you the way that I do, yeah
Today I drove through the suburbs
And pictured I was driving home to you

And I know we weren't perfect
But I've never felt this way for no one, oh
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay, now that I'm gone
I guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

Red lights, stop signs
I still see your face in the white cars, front yards
Can't drive past the places we used to go to
'Cause I still fuckin' love you, babe (ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh)
Sidewalks we crossed
I still hear your voice in the traffic, we're laughing
Over all the noise
God, I'm so blue, know we're through
But I still fuckin' love you, babe (ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh)

I know we weren't perfect but I've never felt this way for no one
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay, now that I'm gone
'Cause you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
Yeah, you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

http://vevo.ly/jMrD19

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Man City 1-2 Chelsea, City miss chance to clinch Title.
snippet.description:
CityÔÇÖs hopes of being crowned Premier League champions were frustrated as Pep GuardiolaÔÇÖs side lost out 2-1 at home by Chelsea.
Knowing victory at the Etihad would see us regain the title, we gained a 44th minute lead thanks to Raheem SterlingÔÇÖs close-range strike.

Sergio Aguero then saw a 45th minute penalty saved ÔÇô and Chelsea hit back after the break as Hakim Ziyech levelled affairs on the hour.

However, though City strove to find a winner and saw a shout for a late penalty turned down, it was Cheslea who gained the winner, Marcos Alonso beating Ederson in injury time to seal the victory and ensure the race goes on ÔÇô at least for 24 hours.

snippet.title: J. Balvin - 7 De Mayo
snippet.description:
J Balvin ÔÇô 7 de mayo (Official Video)

ÔÇİ7 de mayoÔÇÖ out now: https://JBalvin.lnk.to/7deMayo!YD 

Shop: https://jbalvinstore.universalmusica.com/

Subscribe to J Balvin's channel here: https://smarturl.it/JBalvinYT

Follow J Balvin: 
https://instagram.com/jbalvin  
https://twitter.com/jbalvin 
https://www.facebook.com/JBalvinOficial 
https://www.tiktok.com/@jbalvin 

LYRICS

[Audio Bit Alba Balvin] 

ÔÇ£Que tu nombre, Jose, ilumine siempre los rostros de las personas.
Que entre Jose y J Balvin no existan diferenciasÔÇØ.

1985, 7 de mayo,
Un barrio en medio de Medallo sali├│ este gallo,
Con el sudor en la frente,
En las manos callos,
Comprend├¡ que sin ra├¡ces no salen tallos,
Caminando por las calles de F├ítima,
Las cuchas de los parceros con l├ígrimas,
Hey! Aspiraciones de maleante,
Y por cosas de la vida termin├® siendo cantante.

Sin redes, sin prensa, la cosa tensa,
Pope con trenzas con Maxi bajo el brazo,
Mucha gente nos tildaba de payasos,
Pero yo era un rey desde que mami estaba en embarazo.

Al ├írabe su hermano lo mataron a balazos,
Pero aprendi├│ a cantazos,
Todo en la vida paso a paso,
En mi mente la palabra ├®xito opac├│ al fracaso.

Aprend├¡ a navegar en la marea,
Desde El Poblado hasta el Francisco Antonio Zea,
Era muy Nea paÔÇÖ los ricos y muy rico paÔÇÖ las Neas,
Todo bello aunque la cosa estaba fea,
Nunca me ense├▒aron la palabra envidia,
Y que primero la familia,
Sagrada como Biblia,
Nunca te pases de la l├¡nea,
Porque puedes terminar como Gaviria.

[Audio Bit Alba Balvin]
ÔÇ£Sigue siempre el consejo de tu padre, que contra todas las apariencias, lo que queda 
del hombre, es la palabraÔÇØ.

Qui├®n dir├¡a que el muchacho cantando en la barber├¡a,
El que la esquina manten├¡a,
Como Los Cangris se vest├¡a,
Y yo supe so├▒ar,
Yankee fue el que me entreg├│ el premio de ├¡cono mundial,
Un colombiano haciendo Reggeaton,
Qu├® estupidez,
Pero, yo v├¡ todo con lucidez,
Am├® las tarimas desde la primera vez,
Katherine se arrepiente de ser mi ex,
Pero cero rencor, 
Al contrario, agradecimiento,
Con los maestros, 
Que dieron conocimiento,
Pero estoy claro, no te miento,
Ser una leyenda,
Sin necesidad de monumento.
Y pas├® por ansiedad,
Tambi├®n por depresi├│n,
Pas├® por falsedad,
Y mal de coraz├│n,
Gracias a mi mam├í,
Me pongo en oraci├│n,
Y hoy en d├¡a no me falta la motivaci├│n,
En mi habitaci├│n,
La meditaci├│n,
Para que nunca me falte la conexi├│n,
Si me muero no recuerden al pegado,
Si no al parcero que ha dejado su legado.

[Audio Bit Daddy Yankee]

ÔÇ£El prop├│sito de un l├¡der, siempre es crear a un nuevo l├¡der. Estoy bien orgulloso de ti, y contento de que, por lo que nosotros nos sacrificamos tanto, ustedes est├®n ahora 
 volando por todo lo alto, as├¡ que sigue rompiendo hermanito, estoy bien orgulloso de      
 ti y de ├¡cono a ├¡cono mundial, mucho respeto papito, te lo merecesÔÇØ.

Que soy perro, que hice tr├¡os, porque hac├¡a fr├¡o,
Con mil mujeres me he metido,
A la m├ís santa le he metido,
Que yo hice cosas sin sentido,
Lo s├®,
Pero eso no me hizo m├ís hombre,
Yo era un ni├▒o asustado en el desorden,
Y aunque nunca he sido de esc├índalos,
Par de gente ha querido manchar mi nombre,
Pero son m├ís los que me quieren,
M├ís los que me apoyan,
Nena tu sabes que salimos de la olla,
Dios te bendiga y te ponga como joya,
S├® que mi m├║sica te soya,
Yo crec├¡ escuchando a Jay Z y a Beyonce,
Nicky, Yankee, ├æejo de Ponce,
So├▒aba con grabar con ellos entonces,
Se me cumpli├│ lo que so├▒aba a los once.








ENGLISH

[Audio Bit Alba Balvin] 

ÔÇ£That your name, Jose, brings joy to other peopleÔÇÖs faces.
That between Jose and J Balvin we never see a differenceÔÇØ

1985, may 7th,
In a slum in the middle of Medallo, this one was born,
With sweat on my forehead,
Calluses in my hands,
I understood that without roots you canÔÇÖt have branches,
Walking on the streets of Fatima,
The face of my peers flooded with tears,
Hey! Criminal aspirations,
And I ended up being a singer.

No social media, no press, everything was tense,
Pope had braids and Maxi under his arm, 
A lot of people said that we were clowns,
But I was a king since mommy was pregnant.


The arab guyÔÇÖs brother was killed in a hall of bullets,
But he learned the hard way,
Step by step with everything in life,
In my mind, the word success overshadowed failure.

I learned to sail the tide,
From El Poblado to Francisco Antonio Zea,
Too ghetto for the rich and too rich for the ghetto,
Everything nice even though the situation was ugly,
Nobody taught me the word envy,
And family is always first,
Holy like the bible,
Never cross the line,
Because you could end up like Gaviria.


[Audio Bit Alba Balvin]

ÔÇ£Always follow you fatherÔÇÖs advise, because in spite of all appearances, what defines 
and makes a man itÔÇÖs his word.ÔÇØ


Who wouldÔÇÖve thought that the boy singing on the barber shop,
The one that kept the corner,
Dressed up like the Cangris,
And I knew how to dream,
Yankee was the one that gave me the global icon prize.
A colombian singing Reggeaton,
How stupid,
But I saw everything lucidly,
I loved the stage since my first time...

ÔÇ£El prop├│sito de un l├¡der, siempre es crear a un nuevo l├¡der. Estoy bien orgulloso de ti, y contento de que, por lo que nosotros nos sacrificamos tanto, ustedes est├®n ahora 
 volando por todo lo alto, as├¡ que sigue rompiendo hermanito, estoy bien orgulloso de      
 ti y de ├¡cono a ├¡cono mundial, mucho respeto papito, te lo merecesÔÇØ.

Que soy perro, que hice tr├¡os, porque hac├¡a fr├¡o,
Con mil mujeres me he metido,
A la m├ís santa le he metido,
Que yo hice cosas sin sentido,
Lo s├®,
Pero eso no me hizo m├ís hombre,
Yo era un ni├▒o asustado en el desorden,
Y aunque nunca he sido de esc├índalos,
Par de gente ha querido manchar mi nombre,
Pero son m├ís los que me quieren,
M├ís los que me apoyan,
Nena tu sabes que salimos de la olla,
Dios te bendiga y te ponga como joya,
S├® que mi m├║sica te soya,
Yo crec├¡ escuchando a Jay Z y a Beyonce,
Nicky, Yankee, ├æejo de Ponce,
So├▒aba con grabar con ellos entonces,
Se me cumpli├│ lo que so├▒aba a los once.








ENGLISH

[Audio Bit Alba Balvin] 

ÔÇ£That your name, Jose, brings joy to other peopleÔÇÖs faces.
That between Jose and J Balvin we never see a differenceÔÇØ

1985, may 7th,
In a slum in the middle of Medallo, this one was born,
With sweat on my forehead,
Calluses in my hands,
I understood that without roots you canÔÇÖt have branches,
Walking on the streets of Fatima,
The face of my peers flooded with tears,
Hey! Criminal aspirations,
And I ended up being a singer.

No social media, no press, everything was tense,
Pope had braids and Maxi under his arm, 
A lot of people said that we were clowns,
But I was a king since mommy was pregnant.


The arab guyÔÇÖs brother was killed in a hall of bullets,
But he learned the hard way,
Step by step with everything in life,
In my mind, the word success overshadowed failure.

I learned to sail the tide,
From El Poblado to Francisco Antonio Zea,
Too ghetto for the rich and too rich for the ghetto,
Everything nice even though the situation was ugly,
Nobody taught me the word envy,
And family is always first,
Holy like the bible,
Never cross the line,
Because you could end up like Gaviria.


[Audio Bit Alba Balvin]

ÔÇ£Always follow you fatherÔÇÖs advise, because in spite of all appearances, what defines 
and makes a man itÔÇÖs his word.ÔÇØ


Who wouldÔÇÖve thought that the boy singing on the barber shop,
The one that kept the corner,
Dressed up like the Cangris,
And I knew how to dream,
Yankee was the one that gave me the global icon prize.
A colombian singing Reggeaton,
How stupid,
But I saw everything lucidly,
I loved the stage since my first time...

snippet.title: El IMPACTANTE TRUCO de Santi Marcilla que enloquece al jurado | Gran Final | Got Talent Espa├▒a 2021
snippet.description:
Una vez concluida la fase de Semifinales de ÔÇİGot Talent Espa├▒aÔÇÖ en la que 56 artistas se pusieron en manos del p├║blico y del jurado para poder ganar su pase para la Gran Final, ha llegado el momento de conocer al ganador de la sexta edici├│n del exitoso formato de Telecinco. 12 finalistas luchan por llevarse la ansiada victoria en una noche cargada de emoci├│n, nervios y muchas sorpresas.

Todos deber├ín subirse de nuevo al escenario para demostrar su talento y dejar claro que merecen ser los ganadores del programa. Cantantes dispuestos a demostrar que tienen la mejor voz, arriesgados n├║meros de acrobacia, sorprendentes trucos de magia, impactantes n├║meros de baile o divertidas actuaciones en las que el humor forman parte de esta gran final en la que el p├║blico tiene la ├║ltima palabra. Ellos deciden qui├®n debe ganar. 

Santi Mill├ín se pone al frente de esta entrega final talent show que cuenta con la cantante Edurne, los humoristas Dani Mart├¡nez y Paz Padilla y el presentador y publicista Risto Mejide como jurado. En esta ocasi├│n ellos simplemente valorar├ín las actuaciones pero no tendr├ín poder de decisi├│n en esta entrega final de la sexta edici├│n de ÔÇİGot Talent Espa├▒aÔÇÖ. 

resentado por Santi Mill├ín en Telecinco el jurado tendr├í la opci├│n de llevar a un concursante directamente a la final mediante un Pase de Oro un├ínime. El resto de los concursantes se deber├ín someter al criterio de la audiencia, que decidir├í mediante sus votos en el plat├│ la identidad de los otros dos concursantes que participar├ín en la Gran Final del programa. 


 ┬íBienvenidos al canal oficial de ÔÇİGot Talent Espa├▒aÔÇÖ!

en.title: Santi Marcilla's magic TRICK that drives everyone crazy | Grand Final | Spain's Got Talent 2021
en.description:
The contestants who participated in the Auditions of ÔÇİSpainÔÇÖs Got TalentÔÇÖ and who have reached the Semifinals again face the verdict of the jury composed of the singer Edurne, the host and publicist Risto Mejide and the comedians Dani Mart├¡nez and Paz Padilla; in addition to the public present on the set.

Everyone will take the stage to show their talent and to show why they deserve to be in the grand finale. Singers willing to show they have the best voice, risky acrobatics numbers, surprising magic tricks, shocking dance numbers or fun performances in which humor is the main character. This and much more is what we will be able to see in an exciting phase from which the finalists of the sixth edition of the program will be chosen.

In each Semifinal of the talent show presented by Santi Mill├ín on Telecinco, the jury will have the option of taking a contestant directly to the final through a unanimous Golden Pass. The rest of the contestants must submit to the criteria of the audience, which will decide through their votes on the set the identity of the other two contestants who will participate in the Grand Final of the show.

Are you ready to laugh, get excited and suffer with each of the performances of the Semifinals of ÔÇİSpainÔÇÖs Got Talent?

Welcome to the official channel of ÔÇİGot Talent SpainÔÇÖ!

snippet.title: Sebasti├ín Yatra, Myke Towers - Pareja Del A├▒o (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Sebasti├ín Yatra, Myke Towers - Pareja del A├▒o (Lyric Video)

ÔÇ£Pareja del A├▒oÔÇØ OUT NOW: https://yatra.lnk.to/Pareja!YD 
Subscribe to my YouTube channel here: https://smarturl.it/SebastianYatraYT
Follow Sebas:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sebastianyatra/ 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/OficialSebastianYatra 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/SebastianYatra 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@Sebastianyatra 
Lyrics:
Uooo, Uooo, mmm,

Que tan loco ser├¡a si yo fuera el due├▒o de tu coraz├│n por solo un d├¡a,
Si nos gana la alegr├¡a, yo por fin te besar├¡a,
┬┐Qu├® pasar├¡a?, podr├¡as ver entre ├®l y yo quien ganar├¡a,

Mi condici├│n, enamorado locamente de una chica que hoy extra├▒o,
Y el no tenerte me hace da├▒o,
Ser├¡amos la pareja del a├▒o, cuanto te extra├▒o,
Sin condici├│n, me enamor├® precisamente de una chica que no es m├¡a,
Y mis amigos lo sab├¡an,
Y a mi todo el mundo me dec├¡a, que pasar├¡a, me dejar├¡as,

Si me dieran solo 24 horas yo la aprovecho,
Juro que yo voy a hacerte cosas que nunca te han hecho
Ya yo me cans├® de ser amigo con derechos, yo tal vez no te merezco 
Pero no hay ni que decirlo, si nos juntamos ser├¡amos la pareja del siglo 
Ponme ya a capella me da con introducirlo, navaja doble filo,
Cortamos y los videos me dio con reproducirlo 

Me lo dec├¡an, yo los ignoraba
Simplemente todo, ahora quedo en la nada
Se lo hac├¡a all├í, los ojos la miraban, 
Yo nunca cre├¡a que el amor cegaba 

Mi condici├│n, enamorado locamente de una chica que hoy extra├▒o,
Y no tenerte me hace da├▒o,
Ser├¡amos la pareja del a├▒o, cuanto te extra├▒o,
Sin condici├│n, me enamor├® precisamente de una chica que no es m├¡a,
Y mis amigos lo sab├¡an,
Y a mi todo el mundo me dec├¡a, que pasar├¡a, me dejar├¡as,

Es a m├¡, mi depresi├│n, de ver una foto tuya y verte en la televisi├│n,
Puede ser que me destruya la mente, detente,
Como dice la canci├│n que no meten preso a nadie por robarse un coraz├│n,
Sufriendo y llorando de pena,
Que no, ya mi llanto no vale la pena, 
Yo no tengo alas, pero tu si vuelas, 
Se vuelve la mala de nuestra novela,
Me tienes sufriendo y llorando de pena, 
Que no, ya mi llanto no vale la pena, 
Yo no tengo alas, pero tu si vuelas, 
Me quitas la pista y me quedo a capella,

Mi condici├│n, enamorado locamente de una chica que hoy extra├▒o,
Y el no tenerte me hace da├▒o,
Ser├¡amos la pareja del a├▒o, cuanto te extra├▒o,
Sin condici├│n, me enamor├® precisamente de una chica que no es m├¡a,
Y mis amigos lo sab├¡an,
Y a mi todo el mundo me dec├¡a, que pasar├¡a, me dejar├¡as,

Yo ten├¡a otra melod├¡a, de lo que resultar├¡a,
Maldita monoton├¡a, fue culpa tuya? ┬┐O fue culpa m├¡a?,
Yo aprend├¡ a vivir con celos, tu aprendiste a no ser m├¡a,
Solo queda ser sincero, yo te quiero todav├¡a.


#SebastianYatra #ParejaDelA├▒o #MykeTowers

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Choker (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots official video for "Choker" from the album Scaled And Icy, available now on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream/Download Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

Directed by Mark C. Eshleman for Reel Bear Media

LYRICS
I don't bother anyone
Nervous when I stand
Choking on the circumstance
Only smoking secondhand
Cut us open, spread us out
Dry us in the sand
Lay the fibers side-by-side
And you'll begin to understand

I know it's over
I was born a choker
Nobody's coming for me.
...coming for me

I don't bother anyone
Never make demands
Choking on the circumstance
Self-sabotage is a sweet romance
Seems like all I'm worth is what
I'm able to withstand
Sooner I can realize
That pain is just a middle man.

I know it's over
I was born a choker
Nobody's coming for me.

I see no volunteers
to co-sign on my fears
I'll sign on the line
Alone.

I'm gonna change my circumstance
I know I need to move right now
'cause...

I know it's over
I was born a choker
Nobody's coming for me.
(only smoking secondhand)

Like a little splinter
buried in your skin
Someone else can carve it out
But when you've got the pin
It hurts a little less
and you can even push it further in
When your body's screaming out
Trust your mind's listening.
Like a silhouette that you can barely see
As the shadow casts upon the ground
where you'll eventually
lay forever, but the day goes on
the sun moves behind you
You get taller, bolder, stronger, 
and the rear-view only blinds you

Subscribe for more official content from Twenty One Pilots: https://top.lnk.to/subscribe 

Site: http://smarturl.it/TOPsite
Store: https://store.twentyonepilots.com 
Spotify: http://smarturl.it/TOPspotify
Facebook: http://smarturl.it/TOPfacebook
Instagram: http://smarturl.it/TOPinstagram
Twitter: http://smarturl.it/TOPtwitter
Tumblr: http://smarturl.it/TOPtumblr
